message:
fix(assignment): defensive cloning and snapshot semantics for store

Add cloneAssignment/cloneTimePtr/normalizeFailureReason helpers. All Get,
GetAll, List, ListByPane, ListByStatus, ListActive, Assign, Reassign now
return cloned copies preventing aliasing bugs from concurrent access.

Add AssignmentUpdate struct and Update method for targeted metadata changes
(replaces pattern of mutating returned pointers + Save).

Normalize FailReason/FailureReason dual-field confusion on load/clone.
Reassignment copies RetryCount not PromptSent. StatusAssigned clears
timestamps and failure fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
